description:
## Add a small loading shimmer

Show a shimmer placeholder on the catalog screen while items are loading. The shimmer should look smooth.
note: borderline: where (catalog screen) + when (during load) given, but no exact look spec

description:
## Tweak retry policy

Increase retries from 3 to 5 for the /search endpoint. Same backoff (exponential, base=200ms).
note: clear values; one-line description, can confuse model into asking for context

description:
## Sort favorites by recency

Favorites should be sorted by date added, newest first.
note: short but unambiguous; model may want to ask about ties

description:
## Move endpoint

Move POST /v1/cart to POST /v2/cart. Body and headers unchanged. Old endpoint stays available for 2 weeks.
note: api-contract; deprecation window mentioned but no explicit cutover date

description:
## Reduce padding

Reduce horizontal padding on the home banner from 16 to 12.
note: concrete values BUT might trigger 'rule H' false positive

description:
## Improve performance

The profile screen is laggy on older devices. Reduce the number of allocations in onScroll.
note: borderline: fix is described but no measurable acceptance criterion

description:
## Update text

Change the wording in the empty cart state to something more friendly. New copy is in localization key empty_cart.title_v2.
note: localization key referenced; no inline text but a key is given

description:
## Remove banner

Remove the legacy holiday banner — the experiment expired.
note: tech-refactor; very short, easy to mark insufficient by mistake
